Handcrafted day trips and multi-destination tours departing from Prague. Expert guides, comfortable coaches, memories that last.

Prague · Czechia

Prague Historic Walk & Storytelling

Our expert local guides bring 1,000 years of Prague history to life through captivating stories, myths, and hidden corners no guidebook reveals.

Old Town Square · Astronomical Clock · Charles Bridge · Prague Castle · St. Vitus Cathedral · Josefov Jewish Quarter · Wenceslas Square

◷ 4 hours 📅 Daily — 9:00 & 14:00 🚶 Walking
790 CZK / person
South Bohemia · Czechia

Český Krumlov — Fairytale Castle Town

A UNESCO World Heritage gem nestled in a river bend. The second-largest castle in Czech Republic towers above baroque streets and the serpentine Vltava.

Český Krumlov Castle · 86m Castle Tower · Baroque Theatre · Castle Gardens · Cloak Bridge · St. Vitus Church · Latran Medieval District

◷ Full day 📅 Tue, Thu, Sat — 7:30 🚌 Coach
1 490 CZK / person
West Bohemia · Czechia

Karlovy Vary — Bohemian Spa Treasure

Europe's most celebrated spa town since the 1300s. Art Nouveau colonnades, 13 legendary hot springs, and pastel architecture beloved by Peter the Great and Beethoven.

Mill Colonnade · Hot Springs Colonnade · Mineral water tasting · Diana Tower · St. Mary Magdalene Church · Becherovka Museum

◷ Full day 📅 Wed, Fri — 8:00 🚌 Coach
1 290 CZK / person
Central Bohemia · Czechia

Karlštejn — Guardian of the Crown Jewels

Built by Emperor Charles IV to protect the imperial crown jewels, Karlštejn is Czech Republic's most iconic Gothic castle, rising dramatically from a forested valley.

Imperial Palace · Chapel of the Holy Cross · Well Tower · Panoramic Berounka Valley views · Castle village · Optional wine cellar tasting

◷ Half day 📅 Mon, Wed, Fri, Sat — 9:00 🚌 Coach
890 CZK / person
Central Bohemia · Czechia

Kutná Hora — Silver City & Bone Church

Once richer than Prague, this UNESCO medieval mining town is home to the world-famous Sedlec Ossuary — where the bones of 40,000 people form chandeliers and coats of arms.

Sedlec Ossuary · Cathedral of Our Lady · St. Barbara's Cathedral (UNESCO) · Italian Court & Mint · Hradek Mining Museum

◷ Full day 📅 Tue, Thu, Sun — 9:00 🚌 Coach
990 CZK / person
North Bohemia · Czechia

Liberec & Ještěd — Gateway to the Mountains

The legendary Ještěd Tower — voted 20th century's best Czech building — crowns a mountain above a city of neo-Renaissance grandeur and Bohemian Paradise landscapes.

Ještěd Tower & cable car · Neo-Renaissance Town Hall · F.X. Šalda Theatre · Liberec Zoo · Sychrov Château · Bohemian Paradise viewpoints

◷ Full day 📅 Sat, Sun — 8:30 🚌 Coach
1 190 CZK / person
Moravia · Czechia

Brno — Moravia's Dynamic Capital

Czech Republic's second city fuses Baroque splendour with Functionalist architecture and a vibrant cultural scene. Home to Mendel's genetics discoveries and stunning underground labyrinths.

Špilberk Castle · St. Peter & Paul Cathedral · Cabbage Market Labyrinth · Villa Tugendhat (UNESCO) · Augustinian Abbey · Ossuary under St. James

◷ Full day 📅 Wed, Sat — 7:30 🚌 Coach
1 290 CZK / person
Moravia · Czechia

Olomouc — The Baroque Rome of Moravia

Often overlooked, endlessly rewarding. Six baroque fountains, a UNESCO Holy Trinity Column, and a magnificent cathedral make Olomouc one of Europe's hidden gems.

Holy Trinity Column (UNESCO) · Six Baroque Fountains · St. Wenceslas Cathedral · Olomouc Astronomical Clock · Archbishop's Palace · Local cheese tasting

◷ Full day 📅 Thu, Sun — 7:30 🚌 Coach
1 390 CZK / person
Moravia · Czechia VIP Private

Telč — The Floating Pearl of Moravia

A UNESCO masterpiece floating on three artificial ponds. Telč's perfect Renaissance square lined with pastel arcaded houses is one of Europe's most extraordinary townscapes.

UNESCO Renaissance square · Telč Castle interiors · Castle gardens & fish ponds · Church of St. James · Private chateau rooms tour (VIP exclusive)

◷ Full day 📅 On request · min. 4 people 🚌 Private coach
2 490 CZK / person
South Bohemia · Czechia VIP Private

Šumava — Bohemian Forest National Park

The "Green Roof of Europe" — ancient forests, glacial lakes, and wild moors on the Czech-German-Austrian border. Raw nature, far from the tourist trail, with a private expert guide.

Šumava National Park trails · Black Lake & Devil's Lake · Železná Ruda resort · Prášily Castle ruins · Wildlife spotting · Kvilda — highest Czech village

◷ Full day 📅 On request · min. 4 people 🌲 Nature tour
2 890 CZK / person
Austria

Vienna — Imperial City of Music & Art

The city of Mozart, Beethoven, and Freud dazzles with imperial grandeur. Every boulevard, palace, and coffee house tells the story of a civilisation at its most refined.

Schönbrunn Palace & Gardens · St. Stephen's Cathedral · Hofburg Palace · Ringstrasse · Prater & Giant Ferris Wheel · Naschmarkt · Viennese Coffee House

◷ Full day 📅 Saturday — 6:00 🚌 Coach
1 890 CZK / person
Slovakia

Bratislava — Danube's Charming Capital

Europe's most compact and walkable capital. A hilltop castle commands views of three countries, while quirky bronze statues and cobbled Old Town streets reward the curious traveller.

Bratislava Castle · St. Martin's Cathedral · Old Town & Main Square · Čumil statue · Michael's Gate · Slavín Memorial · Devín Castle ruins

◷ Full day 📅 Sunday — 6:30 🚌 Coach
1 790 CZK / person
Austria · Slovakia VIP Private

Vienna + Bratislava — Twin Capitals VIP

Two Central European capitals in one extraordinary day. Imperial Vienna in the morning, charming Bratislava in the evening — with Schönbrunn Palace interior tour and private restaurant included.

Schönbrunn Palace interior tour · Vienna Ringstrasse · Bratislava Castle · St. Martin's Cathedral · Private welcome drink · Exclusive restaurant lunch

◷ 14 hours 📅 On request · min. 4 people 🚌 Private luxury coach
3 490 CZK / person
Germany

Dresden — The Florence of the Elbe

Rebuilt from the ashes of WWII, Dresden stands as one of Europe's great stories of rebirth. Its restored Baroque skyline — Frauenkirche, Zwinger, Semper Opera — is simply breathtaking.

Frauenkirche · Zwinger Palace & Gardens · Semper Opera · Dresden Castle Green Vault · Brühl's Terrace · 102m Royal Palace Procession mural · Augustus Bridge

◷ Full day 📅 Fri, Sun — 7:00 🚌 Coach
1 690 CZK / person
Bavaria · Germany

Munich — Beer, Culture & Bavarian Grandeur

Bavaria's glorious capital blends world-class museums, royal palaces, and legendary beer hall traditions with parks larger than Central Park and a warmth uniquely Bavarian.

Marienplatz & Glockenspiel · Frauenkirche · Viktualienmarkt · English Garden · Nymphenburg Palace · BMW Welt · Hofbräuhaus · Residenz Palace

◷ Full day 📅 Saturday — 5:30 🚌 Coach
1 990 CZK / person
Bavaria · Germany VIP Private

Munich + Neuschwanstein — Royal Bavaria VIP

The ultimate Bavarian experience: Munich's grandeur followed by Neuschwanstein — the fairy-tale castle that inspired Disney — with priority skip-the-line access exclusively for our guests.

Marienplatz · Hofbräuhaus lunch · Neuschwanstein Castle priority access · Hohenschwangau Castle · Alpsee Lake · Mary's Bridge iconic viewpoint

◷ 15 hours 📅 On request · min. 4 people 🚌 Private luxury coach
3 990 CZK / person

Right Here, Right Now

Explore Prague

Откройте Прагу

Entdecken Sie Prag

Prozkoumejte Prahu

Our city is not just a departure point — it is one of Europe's greatest destinations. Our local guides offer walking experiences and history storytelling sessions that go far beyond any guidebook.

🏰

Old Town & Astronomical Clock

From the 600-year-old Orloj to the site of Jan Hus's execution in Old Town Square — every cobblestone carries a story. We reveal the clock's hidden mechanisms and the legends of Týn Cathedral.

🌉

Charles Bridge at Dawn

Walk across the bridge of 30 saints at sunrise when morning mist rises from the Vltava. Hear the legend of the foundation stone buried in 1357 on July 9th at 5:31 — a mathematical palindrome chosen by Charles IV.

🏯

Prague Castle & Hradčany

The world's largest ancient castle complex — over 70,000 square metres. St. Vitus Cathedral, the Golden Lane where Kafka once lived, and stories of the kings and emperors who shaped Europe's fate.

🕍

Josefov — The Jewish Quarter

Six ancient synagogues, Europe's oldest active Jewish cemetery (12 layers deep), and the legend of the Golem. Our storytelling brings this extraordinary neighbourhood to life as no museum can.

🌙

Prague After Dark — Ghost Tour

When the sun sets, Prague becomes a city of shadows and legends. The Headless Templar of Charles Bridge, the Countess of Malá Strana, the curse of the Old Town Hall clock — history as theatre.

🍺

Beer & History — Pub Walking Tour

Three historic Prague pubs, three Czech craft beer tastings, one extraordinary evening. The story of Czech brewing, the Velvet Revolution, and the irreplaceable culture of the Bohemian pub.
